$comment: Year 7 (Romans + James) tier definitions. Transcribed from the QuizMeet booklet on 2026-05-12. Club 150 lives in the deck file already (sourced from the Anki .colpkg). Club 300 is the additional 150-verse cut, not yet authored in Anki. The full year-7 material is every chapter of Romans (1-16) and James (1-5) in entirety — 541 verses total. Both Club 150 and Club 300 hit every chapter of both books, so the expand-to-full-chapters rule matches what would be hand-listed.
